title: The Impacts of Evangelion
wikitext: []: The Impacts of Evangelion             Quote Post by SawItAtAge10 » Fri Feb 22, 2013 12:19 pm This topic might already exist somewhere else on the forum, but I thought I would ask it any way...Okay, here it goes: First of all these ideas pertain to the original NGE series ONLY (All bets are off when it comes to Rebuild...). This is my take on the 1st, 2nd, and 3rd impacts. It is simply my opinion based on observations and scientific knowledge (a hypothesis?) Everyone is free to correct me or add whatever kinds of insights you might be able to add. PRE-FIRST IMPACT- Adam leaves whatever planet or state of existence that the First Ancestral Race (this is the same point of origin as Lilith) come from. Maybe the point of origin is the center of the big bang itself (as implied by the show's opening...) He leaves with his seed which is essentially the formless, moonless (as in no white moon orbiting it) Earth. He's inside of it in his perfect god-like existence terraforming it to be a world for his children- the Angels. Since he is a perfect being, he doesn't need to strive for anything and has almost magical like powers (the tree of life). The Earth is essentially is own unchanging Garden of Eden. FIRST IMPACT- (I'm surprised that there is not more discussion about this...) Lilith comes from the same distant point of origin as Adam. She's on her own terraforming/colonizing mission of existence. Along her journey, her seed collides with what Adam had already established as his version of Earth. This is a literal impact as the asteroid that is Lilith's seed crashes into the Earth (a piece of alien matter integrating itself into what already naturally existed on the planet) and sends a chunk of the earth (the moon) into space where it orbits the planet. The impact causes all of the axial rotations that humans are used as well as the tidal formations (because of the newly established white moon that was Adam's seed). Thus, the planet is in full "Lilith-mode" where the biology of plants, animals, and the evolution of man (as we understand them) begin to occur. This is something that was never meant to take place since Earth actually rightfully belongs to Adam and his children (the Angels). This is also true because of the individualistic nature of the Angels (Adam and Lilith included) and how each of the beings that comes from the FAR's point of origin are supposed to be completely self-contained colonizers/creators. Anyway, Adam is "knocked out" and Lilith's lance is destroyed by the 1st Impact and life as we understand it initiates and continues for billions of years until... My basis for this conceptualization of 1st impact is based off the idea of panspermia which is the idea that life on Earth originated from a meteor or asteroid that collided with Earth (either accidentally or on purpose at the hands of a "colonizer/creator") that carried bacteria or micro-organisms (maybe even DNA itself) that were the basis for higher species of life. The other theory idea behind this is that after the big bang, the earth had already formed a certain way with certain atmospheric conditions (possible life or the proto-formations of life such as DNA structures or micro-origins/"Pre-life" structures). THEN, an asteroid collided with that version of earth and changed the atmosphere, and the rotation. A chunk of the naturally existing earth was booted out to become our moon (and subsequently controls the gravity of tides and sleep cycles of animals and all the other things a moon does- such as implement a light/darkness-day/night duality within the psychology of all humans). The alien planetoid matter then fused with our planet and the commonly understood evolutionary processes established by Darwin commenced. One could say that here in "real-life", we are continuing to live in a "First Impact Existence". Another interesting note is that the theory that an asteroid collided with Earth to create the moon is actually referred to as the “Giant Impact Theory”. That’s curious- Giant Impact, Giant of Light- I wonder if there’s a connection… SECOND IMPACT- Humans find Adam sleeping in Antarctica. They also find his lance and his dead sea scrolls (his instructions for what to do with his seed and the times of awakening (possibly birth of) for his offspring the Angels. At some point, he is awoken and must of immediately realized that his seed is gone and "the perfect garden" destroyed. His initiate is to then reset thing back to their original state so that he can start the process (that was well underway prior to the arrival of Lilith) all over again. Thus, he "re-terraforms" the Earth into a state of perfection once again. (Hence the the constant "spring/summer" like conditions and the "Loss of autumn" as mentioned by Fuyustski in ep. 21.) In this variation of recreation, he reverts not only the Earth, but his own physical body as well. This destruction of himself is a sacrifice to ensure that the world he created exists solely for his offspring-- the Angels. In self destructing/reverting to an embryo, he releases all of his potential just for the sake of a reset. Everything else that happens to his soul and cloned flesh is of an artificial nature done by the very race he was attempting to annihilate (Humanity-- children of Lilith) through this self-sacrifice. His soul at some point is transferred into Kaworu and his lance is taken by NERV to halt the growth of Lilith whose seed (that crashed into Earth billions of years ago) is found with her. Thus, the world of NGE is physically the one that Adam existed in prior to the arrival of Lilith, but is dominated by Lilith based life forms, the highest being humans. A thing about "seeds". I feel that the seeds of Adam and Lilith are equivalent to the red cores that all Angels seem to possess. This is also equivalent to S2 organs. What makes the S2 organ so "infinitely powerful" is that they are all seeds from the tree of life which is the source of the Angel's "magical"/physics defying powers (Adam and Lilith included). This is the reason Eva Unit 1 is seen as god-like when it consumes one. The "infinite power" stems from the magnitude of potential held within it. Basically, each Angel is liked a pregnant woman carrying their potential womb along with them. In that sense, if an angel were to accomplish its goal, it would do what Lilith/Rei did with her black moon seed in EoE and effectively release the absolute potential of its core. I imagine that the life would be liquidated like in the film only to be recreated (atom by atom and molecule by molecule) to create an entire race of whatever Angel caused the third impact. The souls of life forms would then be transported into those new bodies and reincarnated as an Angel race. Maybe cosmic Eva Unit 1/Yui would replicate "organic" variations of Unit 1 or herself (human form) through her seed on some distant lifeless planet? THIRD IMPACT- Returning Lilith's soul to her crucified body is a kind of revival or resuscitation. The fusion of Adam with her is a kind of wake-up call that tricks her into believing basically what Adam became aware of when awoke- that the world of her children (and possibly the children themselves) are in danger. I think this initiation caused her to believe that humans were non-Lilin who needed to be broken down (turned into LCL) and rebuilt piece by piece and turned into her children with the souls transplanted/reincarnated into the bodies. With this trickery underway, Lilith also began re-terraforming the Earth into the world we know-- the pre-2nd Impact state. Thus, the Lilin were being reborn as themselves in a regenerated Lilith based planetary system. Thus, the humans reincarnated as themselves would have to get used to changes in weather, seasons and all of the existential pain/joy of life that we live in today. Also, in the last ditch effort to "save" her children, she did what Adam did, and released all of her full potential (hence her self-decay as GNR starts to fall apart). The use of Adam's little body (and possibly his soul which might have been stewing in the LCL after Kaworu's death) seems absolutely necessary to initiate this version of 3rd Impact. It begs the question of what SEELE was going to do without him? It seems it would be Unit 1 (which is, as I understand it, a clone of Lilith with Yui's soul inside) fusing with Lilith's body (which has its own soul back through the fusion of Rei or maybe their plan didn't involve that either??). So it would have involved the body of Lilith fusing with Unit 1 to create the impact and charge an anti-AT Field through the MPE's S2 organs. Maybe then the LCL of humanity would go into Unit 1 and exist as its absolute potential (the seed). It seems that that is the key difference between Gendo and SEELE's goals: Gendo wants to release the potential to reset humanity/Earth (through his trickery of fusing Adam) and find Yui by controlling the process with Adam. SEELE wants to lock up the potential (the LCL or Seed) as a kind of singularity or single being like Adam or Lilith (maybe as the "sea of LCL" or within Eva Unit 1) for the possibility of remaining that way for all eternity OR unleashing it at a later time possibly not even on Earth. In the end, the Rei/Lilith sacrificing herself/releasing all potential is evident to be what happens as humans (with the power to bring themselves back to life by imagining themselves in their own hearts) are slowly reincarnated as themselves. GNR dies after the process is over and the seed bursts to start the Lilith based version of Earth all over again (maybe not from the beginning since the Humans are the highest form of evolutionary potential at this point). Any thoughts, insights or comments on this are welcome and I like hearing the ideas of others.
